steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures around the blank
steps.content:
On the left: an independent clause with subject epic poems (plural) and linking verb are
On the right: a dependent relative clause that tell a story and focus on heroic deeds with plural verb tell

steps.title: Apply the number agreement rule
steps.content:
A predicate nominative must agree in number with its subject. B) long poems is plural, matching the plural subject and serving as the antecedent for the plural verb tell in the relative clause. The possessives A) and C) don't fit the noun phrase function needed for a predicate nominative, and D) is singular, violating number agreement.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
